{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231952037AFEE455672F72F27716"}"},"total":1127},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7402168883175703358","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前我还是能给满星的！毕竟题材不错，也不出戏，内容也很活泼[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]我看过一本类似的题材，来了个高粱车神我就弃书了，毕竟赵匡胤都没来现代，赵光义就来了！！！我不能忍，但是你这里选的人物都很好，我喜欢","text_exts":[{"e":70,"s":67,"text":"赵匡胤","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426672472F27716%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227402168883175703358%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227390380772437281854%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723456005,"group_id":"7390380772437281854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyP6LQneMXz3obAUeNpH8KE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"140340093783047","user_name":"壹挈闺零"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"140340093783047","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776066973,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390380772437281854","book_info":{"abstract":"群像文，无CP，支援各朝，改变意难平！
一个个朝代节点被解锁，一位位古人来到现代景区，与游客们来一场古今的碰撞！
行走在古色古香的街道上，看着这些青史留名的人，还有那些不会在史书留下半分痕迹的人。
你可以看看失传的技艺，看这墨家机巧。
你可以逛逛上元灯节，看看东风夜放花千树。
可以听听程咬金讲述牛的一百种意外去世法。
你可以尝尝大唐的酥山，尝尝大唐的茶团。
你可以身着甲胄，与秦锐士一起高唱秦风！
你可以策马扬鞭，随冠军侯一起封狼居胥！
可以给丞相看看成都去洛阳的车票…
你还可以和李清照划拳拼酒！五魁首哇！
你可以告诉陆游辛弃疾，那个人，对，他以前是乞丐，他北定中原了！
告诉朱元璋，老四干的不错，但你的标儿在这一定能被救回来！
哦，还有那些，不在史书的人，他在兵马俑上留下了指纹，他曾是保家卫国的士卒，她是长安城里的琵琶女，他是东市的菜贩子，他是死在封狼居胥前的骑兵，他是少府的工匠，他在东京挑担叫卖，他修筑了紫禁城，你会想和他聊聊吗？
欢迎来到，万朝千古城！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/44be38ad5dbff3d67e850dc4b71245b0","author":"六个硬币","author_id":"","book_id":"7390380772437281854","book_name":"古今缘分一线牵，千年景区来相会","book_short_name":"景区万朝录","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7390380863147491902","read_count":"38430","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2037287"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"918","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,无女主,无后宫,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aea7cfc504577dba698b796ab5807cdb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450724&x-signature=1D36Hgh%2FWOl65xNqM7OOOo3io3k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"193121934926567","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"159"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231952037AFEE455672F72F27716"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_s
